name: Live+ Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Dining, Food Delivery, and Grocery spends

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year (1 per calendar quarter).

joiningBenefitsValued.label: ₹1,000 cashback after logging into the HSBC India app and spending ₹20,000 within the first 30 days
Voucher worth up to ₹750 for Amazon Pay, Zomato, and Swiggy on card activation with a single transaction of ₹300 or more

joiningBenefits: ₹1,000 cashback after logging into the HSBC India app and spending ₹20,000 within the first 30 days
Voucher worth up to ₹750 for Amazon Pay, Zomato, and Swiggy on card activation with a single transaction of ₹300 or more
additionalBenefits: Times Prime annual membership on card activation (Visa Signature offer)
District by Zomato dining and movie offers, subject to terms
Complimentary domestic flight seat selection twice a year on bookings via MakeMyTrip
additionalDetails: Cashback is credited as statement credit within 45 days of the statement date
Qualified annual spend of ₹2 Lakhs waives the renewal fee of ₹999

salaried: Minimum monthly income of ₹50,000 (₹6 Lakhs per annum)
Reside in an eligible service city listed by HSBC
selfEmployed: Reside in an eligible service city listed by HSBC

internalNotes: Official HSBC Live+ page rechecked on 2026-07-10 after the 2026 upgrade video source. HSBC currently lists 10% cashback on dining, food delivery, and grocery spends up to ₹1,000 per month, plus 1.5% unlimited cashback on most other spends.

Public reports from Paisabazaar, SaveSage, CreditKeeda and DesiDime, along with the 2026-07-03 YouTube transcript, say HSBC cardholder communication announced future Live+ changes effective 2026-07-26: Visa Infinite upgrade, 10% cashback extended to eligible shopping and utilities, 10% cashback cap raised to ₹1,200/month, ₹250 quarterly cashback on eligible contactless fuel spends, reduced 1.99% forex markup, 1 international lounge visit per year from 2026-09-01, reduced domestic lounge access, and removal of 1.5% cashback for international, hospital and local-transport spends. HSBC's public product page and Live+ service guide still showed the old current terms when rechecked on 2026-07-10, so structured current reward, lounge and forex fields remain on the public official terms until HSBC publishes updated terms.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
10% cashback on dining, food delivery, and groceries is capped at ₹1,000 per month combined, then reverts to the base 1.5% cashback rate.
Excludes fuel, rent, insurance, government, education, wallet loads, utilities, gold, and EMI transactions from earning cashback.
